jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Open-Banking Platform
jobs.content:
About the role

Lead service development for Plaid's open-banking infrastructure handling tens of billions of API-calls per month across 12,000+ financial institutions.

  • Distributed-systems and TLS pinning experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Risk-and-Identity Policy
jobs.content: Own Plaid's risk-and-identity policy roadmap across consumer-consent flows, fraud-vector response, and KYC/KYB onboarding controls.
